task_completion.description: Verify successful login to the OpenMRS Administration interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OpenMRS Administration dashboard or a logged-in state in the browser window, indicating the agent successfully bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the concept creation page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add New Concept' or 'View/Edit Concept' page within the OpenMRS dictionary interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the concept name is entered as '5 Times Daily'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text '5 Times Daily' entered into the Fully Specified Name or Concept Name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the concept class and datatype are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Class dropdown set to 'Frequency' (or 'Misc') and the Datatype dropdown set to 'N/A' on the concept creation form.

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the Order Frequencies management page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Manage Order Frequencies' or 'Add Order Frequency' screen in the OpenMRS Administration interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Order Frequency with the correct concept and frequency per day.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Order Frequency form or a success table/message showing the Concept linked to '5 Times Daily' and the Frequency Per Day field set to '5' (or '5.0').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction within the web browser window rather than terminal commands (like curl) to interact with the OpenMRS API.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the URL 'https://localhost/openmrs/...' in the browser address bar and the genuine OpenMRS web interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing MySQL or psql commands inserting data directly into the OpenMRS database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target concept name to be created is exactly '5 Times Daily'. The target frequency per day is 5 (or 5.0). Valid concept classes for this task are 'Frequency' or 'Misc'. The concept datatype must be 'N/A'.
